description_long: This helmet features a robust, full-face design with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, giving it a distinctive, angular silhouette. The exterior is primarily white with bold, weathered orange markings, including a broad stripe over the top and angular accents on the face and sides. The front faceplate has a black T-shaped visor area, bordered by sharp, geometric lines, providing a futuristic and militaristic appearance. The sides display circular ear coverings and a raised, fin-like crest that extends backward, adding to its aggressive profile. The surface shows signs of wear and scuffing, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. The rear of the helmet features a rectangular vent-like detail and additional orange striping, maintaining the cohesive color scheme.
description: A white and orange, full-face helmet with a central ridge, black T-shaped visor, and weathered, angular markings. The design is futuristic and militaristic, with visible wear and a prominent rear crest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black T-shaped visor, central ridge, and symmetrical orange markings framing the faceplate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the raised crest, circular ear covering, and weathered orange band wrapping around the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a rectangular vent detail, symmetrical orange stripes, and the back of the central ridge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the crest, ear covering, and orange band visible, along with surface scuffing.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered orange stripes and angular patterns on a white base, with a black T-shaped visor area; no text or imagery.
